steps.title: Dry Wipe Door Surface
instructions: Clean the door surface using a dry wiping cloth to remove dust.

steps.title: Apply IP Solution to Cloth
instructions: Apply IP solution to the wiping cloth.

steps.title: Wet Wipe Door Surface
instructions: Thoroughly wipe the door surface with the wet cloth.

steps.title: Return Cloth to Cabinet
instructions: Place the wiping cloth back into the cabinet and close it.

steps.title: Fix Grommet on Door
instructions: Secure the grommet onto the designated position on the door.

steps.title: Collect Primary Seal
instructions: Retrieve the primary seal from the storage area.

steps.title: Fit Seal into Clamp
instructions: Properly seat the seal into the clamp assembly.

steps.title: Stick Seal onto Door
instructions: Remove the backing tape and attach the seal to the door.

steps.title: Press Seal with Both Hands
instructions: Apply firm pressure on the seal using both hands for secure adhesion.

steps.title: Remove Grommet
instructions: Carefully remove the grommet from the door.

steps.title: Press Seal Upper Side
instructions: Use the tool to press the upper section of the seal.

steps.title: Rotate Door Trolley Handle
instructions: Rotate the trolley handle to adjust the door position.

steps.title: Move Door Upward
instructions: Move the door trolley in an upward direction.
